title: adonis volgensis var. villosa
intro: Adonis volgensis var. villosa, also known as the hairy Adonis or hairy Pyrethrum, is a plant species within the genus Adonis and family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including rheumatism and fever. The health benefits of Adonis volgensis var. villosa include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering its roots, which can then be used as a remedy in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
